prose:
A frontier-orbital calculation was performed on aniline using Density Functional Theory (DFT) with the tier 'standard' method (B3LYP functional, def2-TZVP basis set). The calculation was run in the gas phase with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1. The geometry was taken from the provided input file without optimization. The calculation was performed using the PySCF program and the SCF energy converged.

The frontier orbital energies are:
HOMO: -5.553772 eV
LUMO: -0.2489544 eV
HOMO-LUMO gap: 5.3048177 eV
